message:
🌱 caddy: proxy: Load Balance using multiple A records per single hostname (#1930)

* 🌱 Add caddy: proxy: Load Balance using multiple A records per single mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add caddy: proxy: Load Balance using multiple A records per single mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: replace raw comment scrape with proper resolution for caddy DNS load balancing

The resolution and steps contained raw GitHub comment text instead of
an actual solution. Replace with proper Caddy v2 reverse_proxy
configuration for DNS-based load balancing across multiple A records.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "caddy-1545-proxy-load-balance-using-multiple-a-records-per-single-hostname",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "caddy: proxy: Load Balance using multiple A records per single hostname",
+    "description": "proxy: Load Balance using multiple A records per single hostname. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Install or upgrade to Caddy v2",
+        "description": "Ensure you are running Caddy v2, which includes native reverse proxy load balancing:\n```bash\ncaddy version\n```\nIf running Caddy v1, upgrade to v2 following the official migration guide."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure reverse_proxy with DNS-based upstreams",
+        "description": "In your Caddyfile, configure `reverse_proxy` to point to a hostname that resolves to multiple A records. Caddy will automatically resolve and load balance across all addresses:\n```\nreverse_proxy backend-service:8080 {\n    lb_policy round_robin\n}\n```\nSupported load balancing policies include `round_robin`, `least_conn`, `random`, `first`, `ip_hash`, `uri_hash`, and `header`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure dynamic upstreams (optional)",
+        "description": "For environments with rapidly changing backends (e.g., Kubernetes), use dynamic upstreams with SRV records or the A record module:\n```\nreverse_proxy {\n    dynamic a backend-service 8080\n    lb_policy round_robin\n}\n```\nThis re-resolves DNS on each request, ensuring new backends are discovered automatically."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify load balancing",
+        "description": "Test that requests are distributed across all resolved addresses:\n```bash\nfor i in $(seq 1 10); do curl -s http://localhost/health; done\n```\nCheck Caddy logs to confirm requests are being routed to different backend IPs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Caddy v2's reverse_proxy directive natively supports DNS-based load balancing. When an upstream hostname resolves to multiple A records, Caddy automatically distributes requests across all resolved addresses. Configure with: `reverse_proxy hostname:port { lb_policy round_robin }`. Caddy v2 also supports dynamic upstreams via SRV records and the `dynamic` upstream module.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "reverse_proxy backend:8080 {\n    lb_policy round_robin\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "caddy",
+      "community",
+      "web-server",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "caddy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy/issues/1545",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 28,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "caddy"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working caddy installation or development environment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:58:35.099Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
